accounting_policies.basis_of_presentation: GAAP, consolidated including all affiliates after elimination of intercompany balances. Fiscal year ends December 31.
accounting_policies.cash_equivalents: Short-term investments with original maturity ≤90 days, recorded at cost (approximates fair value)
accounting_policies.receivables: Net of allowance for expected credit losses ($1,501K in 2024, $903K in 2023). Allowance based on delinquencies, aging, industry trends, historical experience.
accounting_policies.cash_pooling: Centralized cash management with BH Finance LLC (Berkshire subsidiary). Day-to-day borrowing not to exceed $10M; no limit on invested amounts. Borrowing rate: one-month SOFR. Investment rate: set by BH Finance. Auto-renews annually Dec 31 (90 days notice to terminate).
accounting_policies.inventories: Lower of cost (FIFO) or net realizable value. Primarily marketing material.

useful_lives.leasehold_improvements: Shorter of 20 years or remaining lease term

accounting_policies.recoverability_long_lived: Reviewed whenever events indicate carrying value may not be recoverable. Compared to undiscounted future cash flows. No impairments recorded 2022-2024.

goodwill_intangibles.method: ASC 350 / ASC 805. Annual impairment test as of Dec 31 at reporting unit level. Discounted cash flow analysis.
goodwill_intangibles.franchise_rights_post_2005: Recognized as intangible apart from goodwill

revenue_recognition.general: Revenue recognized when good/service transferred to customer. Substantially all at point in time.
revenue_recognition.service_fees: Continuing license fees based on franchised location sales. Recognized as usage of license occurs.
revenue_recognition.other_fees: Supply chain fees at point of sale; new store development at restaurant opening; transfer/termination fees when services performed; sales promotion management fees as percentage of committed advertising.
revenue_recognition.deferred_franchise_income: Renewal and new store licensing rights recognized over contractual term. $3,024K (2024), $2,816K (2023).

accounting_policies.leases: ASC 842. ROU assets and liabilities for leases >1 year. Operating lease liabilities measured using risk-free rate.
accounting_policies.committed_advertising: Company acts as AGENT of advertising funds. Receipts/disbursements recorded NET on balance sheet. Liability position = unexpended franchisee funds.

income_taxes.method: Asset and liability method (ASC 740). Included in Berkshire consolidated federal return but prepared on separate company basis.

accounting_policies.gift_card_liabilities: Cash receipts classified as current liability. Reduced on redemption through reimbursement to franchisees. Breakage recognized proportionally to redemptions; credited to Committed Advertising less management fees.
accounting_policies.foreign_currency: Canadian subsidiaries measured in local currency. Assets/liabilities at period-end rates; income/expense at average monthly rates. Translation adjustments in AOCI.
accounting_policies.use_of_estimates: Significant estimates: service fee accruals, tax contingencies, allowance for credit losses.

other_assets.notes: Deferred compensation plan enables officers to defer cash comp into mutual funds in rabbi trust (Level 1 fair value). No company contributions 2022-2024. Deferred incentives for franchisee remodels/tech/new builds, amortized 3-7 years.

leases.description: Leases for admin facilities, equipment, and one retail restaurant. Most require payment of executory costs. Restaurant lease: greater of base rent or % of gross sales.

employee_benefit_plans.retirement_savings_plan: Substantially all permanent FT employees eligible. Employee contribution: 1%-35% of base pay (IRS limits). 2024 company match: 100% of first 2% + 50% of next 4% = max 4%. Prior years: max 3.5%.

contingencies.statement: Company involved in various legal proceedings in ordinary course of business. Management opinion: ultimate disposition will not have material effect on financial position or results.
